character.name: Full-body figure of a single
character.prompt: Full-body figure of a single Janissary solak archer, standing in an A-pose on a flat neutral off-white background with diffused soft-box lighting, no environment. Male, mid-20s, wiry and lean, fair complexion with a reddish undertone suggesting Bosnian or Slavic origin, deep-set blue-grey eyes, angular jaw, a thick upturned mustache worn alone with no beard, medium brown hair visible at the temples below the white bork headdress which features a narrow brass plate and a short black plume. Wearing a short indigo kaftan with cropped sleeves and simple copper buttons, a broad leather belt cinched tight, loose cream-colored sirwal trousers gathered at the knee, soft leather ankle boots. A composite recurve bow is held loosely in his left hand, and a cylindrical leather quiver packed with fletched arrows slung crossbody from right shoulder to left hip. Bare forearms show faded geometric tattoos. Expression watchful, slightly weary — the look of a sentry approaching the end of his watch. Symmetrical pose, full frontal, clean lighting with no cast shadow. Hyperrealistic, 8K, character reference sheet style, no background, no environment.
